exercises.code:
def load_config(defaults, file_cfg, env, flags):
    cfg = dict(defaults)
    cfg.update(file_cfg or {})
    cfg.update(env or {})
    cfg.update(flags or {})
    return cfg
print(load_config({"a":1}, {"a":2}, {"a":3}, {"a":4}))
